title: machaeranthera arenaria
intro: Machaeranthera arenaria, also known as Purple Sage, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as digestive problems and skin conditions. The health benefits of Machaeranthera arenaria include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and promote wound healing, among others. Herbal preparations of Machaeranthera arenaria include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in a carrier oil or water.
